sentences.target: Wir treffen uns in der Kneipe.

translations.de: Wir treffen uns in der Kneipe.
translations.pt: A gente se encontra no bar.
translations.vi: Mình gặp nhau ở quán bar.
translations.nl: We spreken af in de kroeg.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; functions as the subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; agrees with 'Wir' and takes the pronoun 'uns' as its (reflexive/reciprocal) object.
Personal/reflexive pronoun, 1st person plural, accusative; direct object co-referential with the subject (reciprocal reading).
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase; governs dative in static-location use.
Definite article, feminine, dative singular; determiner agreeing with 'Kneipe' within the PP.
Common noun, feminine, singular, dative; object of the preposition 'in', indicating location.

sentences.target: Die Kneipe macht heute schon um neun zu.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈknaɪ̯pə maxt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ʃoːn ʊm nɔʏ̯n tsuː/

translations.de: Die Kneipe macht heute schon um neun zu.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈknaɪ̯pə maxt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ʃoːn ʊm nɔʏ̯n tsuː/
translations.en: The pub closes at nine today.
translations.es: Hoy el bar cierra a las nueve.
translations.fr: Le bar ferme à neuf heures aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi il pub chiude alle nove.
translations.ko: 술집은 오늘 아홉 시에 문을 닫아요.
translations.pt: Hoje o bar fecha às nove.
translations.vi: Hôm nay quán bar đóng cửa lúc chín giờ.
translations.nl: De kroeg sluit σήmepa om negen.
translations.hi: पब आज नौ बजे बंद होता है.
translations.pl: Pub dziś zamyka się o dziewiątej.
translations.el: Το μπαρ σήμερα κλείνει στις εννιά.
translations.nb: Puben stenger i dag klokka ni.
translations.id: Bar hari ini tutup jam sembilan.
translations.sv: Puben stänger i dag klockan nio.
translations.da: Pubben lukker i dag klokken ni.
translations.ja: パブは今日は9時に閉まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine, nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine, singular, nominative; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; combines with the separable particle 'zu' (compound verb 'zumachen' = 'to close').
Temporal adverb; modifies the predicate, indicating the day.
Degree/temporal adverb; adds aspectual nuance ('already') to the predicate.
Preposition used for clock times; governs accusative in the time PP.
Cardinal numeral; complement of 'um' in the time expression ('at nine'), accusative by government.
Separable verbal particle; forms the particle verb with 'macht' (clause-final placement), yielding the meaning 'to close'.

sentences.target: Er arbeitet abends in einer Kneipe.

translations.de: Er arbeitet abends in einer Kneipe.
translations.en: He works in a pub in the evenings.
translations.es: Por las noches trabaja en un bar.
translations.fr: Le soir, il travaille dans un bar.
translations.it: La sera lavora in un pub.
translations.ru: По вечерам он работает в пабе.
translations.pt: À noite, ele trabalha em um bar.
translations.vi: Buổi tối anh ấy làm việc ở quán bar.
translations.nl: 's Avonds werkt hij in de kroeg.
translations.hi: शाम को वह पब में काम करता है.
translations.nb: Om kvelden jobber han på en pub.
translations.id: Pada malam hari dia bekerja di bar.
translations.sv: På kvällarna jobbar han på en pub.
translations.da: Om aftenen arbejder han på en pub.
translations.ja: 彼は夜はパブで働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive 'arbeiten', modified by temporal and locative phrases.
Temporal adverb indicating habitual time ('in the evenings'); modifies 'arbeitet'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; governs dative in static-location use.
Indefinite article, feminine, dative singular; determiner agreeing with 'Kneipe' in the PP.
Common noun, feminine, singular, dative; object of the preposition 'in', indicating workplace/location.

sentences.target: Neben der Kneipe steht mein Fahrrad.

translations.de: Neben der Kneipe steht mein Fahrrad.
translations.en: My bike is next to the pub.
translations.es: Mi bici está al lado del bar.
translations.fr: Mon vélo est à côté du bar.
translations.it: La mia bici è accanto al pub.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的自行车在酒吧旁边。
translations.ru: Мой велосипед стоит рядом с пабом.
translations.pt: Minha bicicleta está ao lado do bar.
translations.vi: Xe đạp của tôi ở cạnh quán bar.
translations.nl: Mijn fiets staat naast de kroeg.
translations.hu: A biciklim a kocsma mellett áll.
translations.hi: मेरी साइकिल पब के बगल में है.
translations.el: Το ποδήλατό μου είναι δίπλα στο μπαρ.
translations.nb: Sykkelen min står ved siden av puben.
translations.da: Min cykel står ved siden af pubben.
translations.ja: 私の自転車はパブの隣にあります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing a spatial PP; governs dative.
Definite article, feminine, dative singular; determiner of 'Kneipe' within the PP.
Common noun, feminine, singular, dative; object of 'Neben'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular possessor; agrees with 'Fahrrad' (neuter nominative singular); modifies the noun.
Common noun, neuter, singular, nominative; subject of 'steht'.
